name: dockermender
description: Multi-host Docker management console deployed with Docker Compose.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dockermender/shared && npm run build --workspace @dockermender/api && npm run build --workspace @dockermender/agent && npm run build --workspace @dockermender/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @dockermender/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @dockermender/api" "npm run dev --workspace @dockermender/web"
scripts.smoke:web: npm run build --workspace @dockermender/shared && npm run smoke --workspace @dockermender/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @dockermender/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @dockermender/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @dockermender/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @dockermender/agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @dockermender/web
